description:
Overview:

Wide Compatibility: The laptop stand fits all laptops 10 - 15.6 inches, such as MacBook, MacBook Air, Macbook Pro, Microsoft Surface, Lenovo ThinkPad, Dell Inspiron XPS, HP, ASUS, Chromebook, and other notebooks PC computers(10-15.6 inches).

3-in-1 Laptop Stand: Open the bottom of the left and right foot frame, and put your laptop on it, the laptop stand can be as a Display height bracket, and also be used for storage keyboard and mouse; 9 levels of view angle adjustable design, which can be adjusted according to your different demands to prevent eyestrain and neck pain; On this stand's back, designed with a phone holder on the left and right sides to place the mobile phone.

Adjustable Laptop Holder:9 levels of view angle adjustment, you can incline at different angles and stand it up higher or lower depending on your needs, The ergonomic laptop stand will help decrease the fatigue and soreness in your body after long hours of uncomfortable seating and hunching.

Laptop Riser with Heat-Vent: This Macbook stand has a big hole for ventilation, and is designed with a cooling slot, insert a cooling silicone pad into the corresponding cooling slot, adjust it to the appropriate position according to the needs of its own notebook and tablet. which is to cool down your laptop by providing more airflow than if it were lying flat on the table.

Study&Simple Installation: The laptop stand weighs 0.96kg (2.1lbs), and supports up to 22 lbs (10kg) weight on top. and the design of one front tab promotes stability tools are needed for adjustment, just adjust it to your demand height and angle by yourself.


Specifications:
Form Factor: Tower
Compatible Devices: Smartphones
Compatible Phone Models: Desktop, Telephones, Keyboard, Laptops
Mounting Type: Phone Mount, Foldable, Tabletop, Freestanding


Package Content:
1*Laptop Stand
